title: Cleaning Out Old Projects
body:
OKAY since we have some extra downtime now and we want to move quickly later, I am going to do some serious culling of old projects.

Some of the more experimental work accumulated a whole bunch of odd stuff that we need to pick through… maybe some of it’s useful outside the lab but right now we need to quarantine this stuff.

We still don’t know exactly how the teams will want to assemble things but we have lots of data on Sabrelake’s security uses.
Funny…

Riscii
‎
